legacyjava/core/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the target JDK version.
legacyjava/core/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

legacyjava/core/src/main/java/search/Sea.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for the first return statement.
legacyjava/core/src/main/java/search/Sea.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it triggers deprecation warnings and will eventually cause compilation errors.

legacyjava/core/src/main/java/search/Sea.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for the assignment statement.
legacyjava/core/src/main/java/search/Sea.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it triggers deprecation warnings and will eventually cause compilation errors.

legacyjava/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
legacyjava/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

legacyjava/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
legacyjava/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling Java 21 source code or may fail to recognize new language features.

legacyjava/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
legacyjava/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-surefire-plugin may fail to run tests on Java 21 due to module system changes or internal API removals.
